name: Tri Wealth Bracelet
details:
Product Description

Turn your everyday intentions into a powerful style statement with the Tri Wealth Bracelet. This thoughtfully designed set of three bracelets combines metallic Pyrite, glossy Black Obsidian and textured Lava Stone in three distinctive arrangements.

Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, confidence and success-focused energy, while Black Obsidian represents grounding and protection from negativity. Lava Stone adds stability and strength, creating a balanced combination for those who want to move towards abundance while staying focused and protected.

One bracelet is completed with a detailed Hamsa charm, traditionally regarded as a symbol of protection against nazar and unwanted energy. Wear all three together for a bold layered look or style them separately according to your outfit and intention.

Why Choose It?

Three Bracelets in One Set:
Includes three coordinated crystal bracelets with individual patterns and styling possibilities.

Wealth-Inspired Crystal Combination:
The combination of Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone represents prosperity, protection and grounded progress.

Meaningful Hamsa Charm:
The detailed Hamsa charm adds a symbolic element traditionally connected with positivity and protection from nazar.

Distinctive Individual Designs:
Each bracelet has its own arrangement while complementing the complete trio.

Flexible Slip-On Construction:
The stretch-style design makes every bracelet easy to wear and remove.

Bold Everyday Styling:
The black, metallic gold and silver-toned combination creates a premium, versatile appearance.

Key Highlights
Set of three coordinated crystal bracelets
Pyrite, Black Obsidian and Lava Stone beads
Wealth, protection and grounding-inspired combination
Detailed silver-toned Hamsa charm
Metallic spacer accents
Flexible stretch-style construction
Wear together or separately
Suitable for men and women
Ideal for everyday styling and meaningful gifting
Crafted With
Pyrite Beads

The metallic golden-grey beads bring richness and shine to the trio. Pyrite is traditionally associated with prosperity, ambition, confidence and success energy. Studd Muffyn’s Richie Rich combination similarly pairs Pyrite with Black Obsidian to represent prosperity supported by protection.

Black Obsidian Beads

The polished black beads add depth and contrast to each design. Black Obsidian is traditionally connected with grounding, emotional steadiness and protection from surrounding negativity.

Lava Stone Beads

The naturally textured black beads give the bracelets an earthy and powerful appearance. Lava Stone is traditionally associated with grounding, stability and remaining steady through changing situations.

Hamsa Charm

One bracelet features a detailed silver-toned Hamsa charm as its central highlight. The Hamsa is traditionally considered a protective symbol believed to guard against nazar, negative intentions and unwanted energy.

Metallic Spacer Accents

Silver-toned spacers separate selected beads and add a clean, premium finish to the crystal arrangements.

Flexible Stretch Cord

The stretchable construction allows each bracelet to slide comfortably over the hand without requiring a clasp.

Crystal Significance
Pyrite — Wealth and Confidence

Pyrite is traditionally known as a crystal of prosperity, ambition and abundance. It may be worn as an intention-based reminder to remain confident, recognise opportunities and stay committed to financial or professional goals.

Black Obsidian — Protection and Grounding

Black Obsidian is commonly associated with energetic protection and emotional grounding. It symbolises remaining steady and less affected by negativity, distractions and stressful surroundings.

Lava Stone — Strength and Stability

Lava Stone is traditionally linked with grounding and inner strength. Its textured appearance represents resilience, stability and the ability to stay balanced while moving through change.

Hamsa — Protection from Nazar

The Hamsa charm is traditionally believed to protect against the evil eye, negative intentions and unwanted energy while inviting positivity and peace.

Together, the three bracelets represent a complete wealth mindset—attracting opportunities, remaining grounded and protecting your energy while working towards success.

Crystal properties and symbolic meanings are based on traditional beliefs and are not financial, medical or guaranteed outcome claims.
